name: PAY_TASK_PARAMETERS
description: pay_task_parameters captures the parameters  required to execute a task

columns.Name: TASK_PARAMETER_ID
columns.Comments: This column is the primary key of the table pay_task_parameters.

columns.Name: BASE_CONTEXT_NAME
columns.Comments: This column contains the base context name value of the task parameter.

columns.Name: PARAMETER_CODE
columns.Comments: This column contains the parameter code value of the task parameter.

columns.Name: BASE_TASK_PARAMETER_NAME
columns.Comments: This column contains the base task parameter name value of the task parameter.

columns.Name: UI_EXPRESSION
columns.Comments: This column contains the ui expression value of the task parameter.

columns.Name: BASE_TASK_PARAMETER_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the base task parameter id value of the task parameter.

columns.Name: BASE_TASK_ACTION_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the base task action id value of the task parameter.

columns.Name: LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUPS.

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Foreign key to FND_TERRITORIES.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ENTERPRISES.

columns.Name: PARENT_TASK_PARAM_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the parent task param id value of the task parameter.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_FLAG
columns.Comments: This column contains the display flag value of the task parameter.

columns.Name: PARAM_DISP_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column contains the param display type value of the task parameter.

columns.Name: PARAM_USAGE_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column contains the param usage type value of the task parameter.

columns.Name: PARAM_SEQUENCE
columns.Comments: This column contains the param sequence value of the task parameter.

columns.Name: PARAM_LOOKUP
columns.Comments: This column contains the param lookup value of the task parameter.

columns.Name: PARAM_VALUE_SET
columns.Comments: This column contains the param value set value of the task parameter.

columns.Name: PARAM_LEVEL
columns.Comments: This column contains the param level value of the task parameter.

columns.Name: DEFAULT_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column contains the default type value of the task parameter.

columns.Name: DEFAULT_VAL
columns.Comments: This column contains the default val value of the task parameter.

columns.Name: DATA_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column contains the data type value of the task parameter.

columns.Name: DATA_DOMAIN
columns.Comments: This column contains the data domain value of the task parameter.

columns.Name: NAMESPACE
columns.Comments: This column contains the namespace value of the task parameter.

columns.Name: REPETITIVE_FLAG
columns.Comments: This column contains the repetitive flag value of the task parameter.

columns.Name: DRIVING_LABEL_METHOD
columns.Comments: Column contains VO/SQL defination that will drive the dynamic label for the parameter. NULL values implies there is no dynamic label generation.

columns.Name: PARAMETER_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column contains the parameter type value of the task parameter.

columns.Name: ELEMENT_NAME
columns.Comments: This column contains the element name value of the task parameter.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: REF_TASK_ACTION_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the ref task action id value of the task parameter.

columns.Name: SGUID
columns.Comments: The seed global unique identifier. Oracle internal use only.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: HDL_ATTRIBUTE
columns.Comments: This column contains the HDL attribute value of the task parameter.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET1
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET1. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET2
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET2. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: MULTI_VALUED_FLAG
columns.Comments: This column contains the multi valued flag value of the task parameter.
